## Checklist

- [ ] `task ci` passes locally (or the relevant `task test` / `task vet` / `task fmt:check`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or operations changed (README / DEPLOYMENT / RUNBOOK / docs)
- [ ] No secrets, real host IPs, or operator-specific values committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the Conventional Commits style (`feat:`, `fix:`, ...)
